title: Desktop session read-only warning fix
acceptanceCriteria: Opening a past Codex Desktop session remains HTTP 200 and shows read-only history.
Unsupported Desktop mutation state is not rendered as a page-level error for read-only browsing.
Disabled Desktop action controls still expose unsupported reasons where actions are attempted.
Live Docker Mini App Projects renders Codex Desktop projects when the codex-desktop compose override is enabled.
